description: The DisplayInfo component is used to get information about the local user's display.

fields.DisplayIndex: The display index to get info on.
fields.Offset: The offset of pixels of display ``DisplayIndex``
fields.DPI: The Dots Per Inch of display ``DisplayIndex``
fields.RefreshRate: The refresh rate in Hertz of ``DisplayIndex``
fields.IsPrimary: Whether display ``DisplayIndex`` is the main monitor in the OS.
